name: Coin Rush
description: Rapid coin collection jingles with metallic sparkle

prompts.SessionStart: bright rapid coin-collect arpeggio ascending with metallic 8-bit sparkle, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: coin-collect arpeggio descending with smooth metallic 8-bit decay, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying coin-collect chime with bright metallic 8-bit ring, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick single coin blip with crisp metallic 8-bit tick, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short coin-collect ding confirming with bright 8-bit ping, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two coin-collect tones with questioning rising metallic interval, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady coin-bounce rhythm with clear metallic 8-bit pulse, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: coin-collect tone splitting into two parallel metallic arpeggios, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear coin-collect ping returning with bright metallic ring, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright rapid coin-rush cascade with energetic metallic 8-bit burst, chiptune notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
